title: slideotter
summary: A local workbench for structured presentations that stay grounded, reviewable, and easy to publish.
note: This tour shows new users where the work lives and how an idea becomes an archived PDF.

cards.title: Structured source
cards.body: Slides, context, sources, and materials stay inspectable in the project tree.

cards.title: Live workbench
cards.body: Preview, edit, attach images, compare variants, and plan decks in one browser flow.

cards.title: Guarded output
cards.body: Generated changes wait for review, then validation protects the archive.
